meta.title: NationFiles JSON Export Sample - /en/continent/south-america/
meta.abstract: Machine-readable sample dataset prepared for peer review, reproducibility checks, and publication supplements. The sample mirrors the live JSON export structure while remaining intentionally lightweight.
meta.quality_note: Sample is generated from a live export endpoint; values may change over time. Schema shape is the primary stable reference for review.

methodology.collection_method: automated HTTP GET from public endpoint
methodology.truncation_policy: sample_data truncated to first 10 list/items and bounded object depth
methodology.normalization: URL-derived filename with non-alphanumeric characters replaced by underscore

license.usage_note: For documentation, peer review, and publication supplements; verify reuse terms with publisher/rights holder.

citation.recommended: NationFiles JSON Export Sample (accessed via source_url, generated_at_utc).
citation.citation_format: Author/Organization. Title. Version. Source URL. Access date.

standards: JSON data package style metadata (practical alignment)

integrity.verification_note: Add cryptographic checksum in publication pipeline if required.

description.text: This endpoint provides continent-level export data for aggregated regional analytics. The sampled payload was fetched from path '/en/continent/south-america/' with query 'export=json&chart=continent_nfsi_30d'. The payload type is object with 1 top-level entries. This sample is intentionally truncated (no pagination) to provide a stable, lightweight download artifact for documentation, QA checks, and integration previews. Representative key paths include: continent_nfsi_30d, continent_nfsi_30d.labels, continent_nfsi_30d.labels[], continent_nfsi_30d.values, continent_nfsi_30d.values[], continent_nfsi_30d.current.
